name: Delhi NCR
industries: The region mixes multinational shared services in Gurgaon, IT and BPO in Noida, and government, PSU and infrastructure programmes in Delhi.
intro: Delhi NCR spreads its project economy across three hubs: Gurgaon's multinational corridors, Noida's IT and services parks, and the capital's government and PSU programmes. That mix means certified project managers find openings everywhere from Fortune 500 shared-services centres to infrastructure bodies executing metro and highway build-outs. Employers across NCR use PMP and CSM as screening filters because candidate volume is enormous — the credential is how you surface. Our live online weekend batch suits NCR's geography: no crossing the city on a Saturday morning, just two full days of instructor-led training on Indian Standard Time from wherever you are. Sessions work through NCR-typical scenarios — government stakeholder management, BPO transitions, multi-vendor programmes. Afterwards you get structured exam application help, full-length mocks, and continued access to the trainer for questions until you certify.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Delhi NCR?
faq.a: Live classes run 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM IST, which is 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM IST in Delhi NCR. You can pick a weekend (Sat–Sun) or a weekday (Wed–Thu) cohort; each completes the course over two consecutive days.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Delhi NCR?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Delhi NCR. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from India?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in India and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Delhi NCR sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in India accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.
